title: Grassy Zesty Norwegian Fry Fritters
description: A keto-friendly Norwegian dish featuring green chilli and fry, perfect for a midnight craving. These fritters are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside with a creamy and grassy flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, and a pinch of salt.
Add diced fry, mayonnaise, grated ginger, minced garlic, and parmesan cheese to the bowl. Mix until just combined.
Heat a large non-stick skillet or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into the pan and flatten slightly.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Repeat with the remaining mixture, adjusting the heat as needed.
Don't overcrowd the pan, cook in batches if necessary.
Wipe the skillet clean with a paper towel before cooking the next batch
If the mixture starts to break apart, adjust the heat and stir gently.
